title: SecurityTypeEnum
description: Represents an enumeration list to indentify the type of a security.

oneOf.title: Certificate
oneOf.description: Identifies a security as one that that offers a derivative-based economic return which is not structured as a bond, an equity or a warrant. Note that this security type is not a Certificate of Deposit (aka CD).

oneOf.title: Debt
oneOf.description: Identifies a security as a fixed income security of debt issued and securitized as a tradable asset.

oneOf.title: Equity
oneOf.description: Identifies a security as an Equity value of holding of shares in listed company.

oneOf.title: Fund
oneOf.description: Identifies a security as representing holding in an investment fund.

oneOf.title: Warrant
oneOf.description: Identifies a security as a Warrant that give the right, but not the obligation, to buy or sell a security — most commonly an equity — at a certain price before expiration, or to receive the cash equivalent.
